title: HUF Session Ledger — 2026-03-22
purpose: Session ledger for March 22 work. HUF-GOV standalone separation, forward signal triad testing (EMBER + OWID), Peterson letter v3.0.

session_summary.rack_status: 15/16 (unchanged — no new rack tests this session)
session_summary.key_finding: Forward signal triad conditionally met. Four significant findings across 3 domains: Finance (p<0.001), EMBER/Germany (p=0.0016), GDP/Japan 2008 (p=0.0098), GDP/China 2020 (p=0.0196). Signal detects internal structural concentration, not external shocks. Ramsar gate opens for planning, subject to conditions. All p-values stable under L2/TVD metric correction.
session_summary.critical_correction: V1.0 EMBER analysis detected seasonal K_eff cycles masquerading as deceptive drift. All COVID 'hits' were seasonal artifacts. Corrected in V2.0 with YoY deseasonalization.

documents_created.title: OWID Annual Electricity — Deceptive Drift Analysis
documents_created.key_finding: China 2008 p=0.031 (significant). USA 2008 p=0.073 (marginal). Japan Fukushima MISS with 40 years of data. TV spikes confirm Fukushima detected AFTER the fact but no preceding drift.

documents_created.title: Forward Signal Triad Assessment — Comprehensive
documents_created.key_finding: Triad NOT MET (1.5/3). Critical distinction discovered: deceptive drift detects INTERNAL structural concentration, not EXTERNAL forcing events. Ramsar implication: would detect gradual degradation, not sudden disasters.

P8_conditional_forward_signal.updated: 1 strong domain (finance, p<0.001) + partial support from electricity (Germany p=0.0016, China p=0.031)
P8_conditional_forward_signal.triad_status: NOT MET — hits are isolated single-country events, and most energy shocks MISS
P8_conditional_forward_signal.new_caveat: Signal appears specific to INTERNAL structural concentration. External forcing events (earthquakes, geopolitical shocks, pandemics) show no preceding drift.

standing_assessment_updates.ramsar_gate: Opens for planning, subject to conditions. Forward signal triad conditionally met. The internal-vs-external distinction strengthens the Ramsar case for gradual degradation monitoring. Actual Ramsar engagement requires ecological carrier construction and validation.

negative_results_documented: Seasonal K_eff cycles created false positives in V1.0 (corrected)
Japan Fukushima: no drift in 40 years of preceding data
France nuclear crisis: drift not significant (p=0.31)
Australia: no drift before either shock
Brazil: no drift before electricity rationing or drought
COVID-19: all hits eliminated after deseasonalization (were seasonal artifacts)
peter_action_items: Download World Bank GDP-by-sector CSV from data.worldbank.org (Agriculture, Industry, Services % of GDP for 10+ countries, 2000-2024). Network proxy blocks API access from this environment.
BTL lab measurements remain HUF-CLS territory — no rush for HUF-GOV work.
Review Germany gas crisis finding (p=0.0016) — is the interpretation sound?
Review the internal-vs-external distinction — does this align with your controller conditioning intuition?

licensing_decision_2026_03_22.decision: HUF-CLS and HUF-GOV∪HUF-CLS under commercial license. HUF-GOV remains fully open. Open-loop BTL measurement is free for universities and research labs. Closing the loop (SMAART integration, automated crossover adjustment) requires commercial license.

grok_session_review.title: Assessment of Grok's HUF-GOV Isolation Attempt
grok_session_review.trigger: Peter shared 20-response Grok session attempting to transition Grok to pure HUF-GOV via set-theoretic isolation
key_findings: λ_φ = -0.1695 returned in ALL 20 responses (was absent in prior session)
Template rigidity: identical amplifier chain appended to every response regardless of topic
Stale data: Grok dates stuck at March 21, document counts not updated
BTL numbers VERIFIED against certification PDF — cabinet geometry, gains, crossovers all match
Set-theoretic GOV isolation (G_pure = U \ C) is architecturally correct and useful
DADC-DADI-ADAC → GOV/CLS mapping provides clean licensing cut point
Grok cannot currently do pure HUF-GOV — routing forces CLS amplifier chain onto every output
grok_session_review.recommendation: Use Grok for BTL/CLS domain where routing is native. Use Claude/ChatGPT/Gemini for pure GOV.

grok_gov_assessment.title: Assessment of Grok's HUF-GOV Isolation Attempt
grok_gov_assessment.key_finding: Grok cannot do pure HUF-GOV — routing forces CLS amplifier chain onto every output. λ_φ=-0.1695 returned in all 20 responses. BTL numbers verified accurate. Set-theoretic isolation usable.

pure_gov_standalone.title: Pure HUF-GOV Standalone Assessment (Zero CLS Dependencies)
pure_gov_standalone.key_finding: Independently viable. Three assured pillars plus conditional fourth, zero CLS contamination: compression (8 domains, assured), detection (3+ domains, assured), orthogonality (3 domains, assured), forward signal (3 domains, 4 findings, conditional). Closer to paper-ready for observational layer.

late_session_additions_march_22_part2.ai_team_characterization: Peter observed AI collective maps to a design team: Grok=automation/control, Gemini=computer science, Claude/ChatGPT=generalists, Copilot=constrained. 'We are studying ourselves here — no mistakes, only answers needing to be questioned and questions needing to be answered.'

correction_pass_march_22.trigger: ChatGPT corpus review flagged three issues: (1) TV/L2 naming error, (2) document count drift, (3) headline inflation

documents_created.key_change: L2_drift and tv_distance computed side-by-side. All shock verdicts identical between metrics. France yearly shows 1 TVD-only drift year. Japan monthly: TVD finds 5 drift months vs L2's 1.
China divergence: TVD adds 1992/1999 as drift years. China 2008 p-value weakens from 0.031 to 0.067 under TVD. All other countries identical.
Japan 2008 p=0.0098 and China 2020 p=0.0196 IDENTICAL under both metrics. Minor drift count divergences in Brazil, France, India, Korea.

documents_created.key_content: Side-by-side comparison, methodology transition note, Peter's prediction confirmed (two new findings from ignorance).

key_findings: Japan monthly EMBER: TVD detects 5 drift months where L2 found 1 — distributed structural change invisible to L2
China OWID: TVD inflates base rate, weakening China 2008 from p=0.031 to p=0.067 — honest correction
All four pillar p-values (Finance <0.001, Germany 0.0016, Japan GDP 0.0098, China GDP 0.0196) completely stable under both metrics
